channel.title: Backstage on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Backstage on Pi Stack

item.title: Self-Hosted Developer Portal: Backstage vs Alternatives Complete Guide 2026
item.description: Every engineering organization eventually hits the same wall: services multiply, documentation scatters across wikis, nobody knows who owns what, and onboarding new developers takes weeks instead of days. A developer portal solves this by centralizing service discovery, documentation, tooling, and infrastructure access into a single, searchable interface.
